name: agent-statusline
description: Hook-backed activity tracking for the agent-statusline renderer across Codex CLI and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Activity hooks for the shared agent statusline
interface.longDescription: Adds UserPromptSubmit, Stop, and SessionStart hooks that maintain neutral per-session activity state consumed by the Zig statusline renderer.
defaultPrompt: Set up agent-statusline for this workspace
Debug why the statusline activity marker is stale
